creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->patched

We are currently testing dbus 1.2.16 with GNOME 2.28, and this version has 
a hack which should fix this problem on BSD.  Therefore, it is believed this 
bug will be fixed when GNOME 2.28 is merged into the ports tree.  Once that 
happens, this PR will be closed.  If, however, the problem is not resolved, 
a new PR can be opened against 1.2.16.
